BH1750advanced.ino.functionality: reads light level data and prints the value to the serial port

BH1750autoadjust.ino.functionality: initializes the BH1750 sensor, makes light level readings every five seconds, and adjusts MTreg value according to the light intensity

BH1750onetime.ino.functionality: initializes BH1750 in high resolution one-time mode, reads light level every second, and prints the value to the serial port

BH1750test.ino.functionality: initializes the BH1750 object in high resolution continuous mode and reads light level every second

BH1750two_i2c.ino.functionality: initializes two BH1750 objects using different TwoWire instances for light level reading every second and counts error occurrences
